tqc.personality.tiger_brave.name: Brave Tiger
tqc.personality.tiger_brave.description: Extremely strong execution, clear goals, dislikes long-windedness.
tqc.personality.tiger_gentle.name: Gentle Tiger
tqc.personality.tiger_gentle.description: Highly cooperative but inwardly strong-willed; values loyalty and relationships.
tqc.personality.tiger_smart.name: Clever Tiger
tqc.personality.tiger_smart.description: Sharp and rigorous thinker; dislikes half-hearted effort.
tqc.personality.tiger_versatile.name: Versatile Tiger
tqc.personality.tiger_versatile.descript: Strong at integration; quickly gathers and processes information from all directions.

tqc.personality.koala_brave.name: Brave Koala

tqc.personality.koala_gentle.name: Gentle Koala
tqc.personality.koala_gentle.description: Highly cooperative; values family; communicates best in a relaxed atmosphere.
tqc.personality.koala_smart.name: Clever Koala
tqc.personality.koala_smart.description: Quick-witted and sensitive; needs to feel a strong sense of security.
tqc.personality.koala_versatile.name: Versatile Koala
tqc.personality.koala_versatile.descript: Handles things smoothly but changes their mind easily; needs decisive, well-timed closing.

tqc.personality.owl_brave.description: Pursues perfection with strong execution; needs time to think things through.
tqc.personality.owl_gentle.name: Gentle Owl
tqc.personality.owl_gentle.description: Values relationships; needs to be persuaded with logic and reason.
tqc.personality.owl_smart.name: Clever Owl
tqc.personality.owl_smart.description: Highly organized, seeks flawless communication, and tends to overthink.
tqc.personality.owl_versatile.name: Versatile Owl
tqc.personality.owl_versatile.descriptio: Skilled at integrating resources but may hesitate when making decisions.

tqc.personality.dragon_brave.description: A natural-born negotiator; values being practical and dislikes boasting.
tqc.personality.dragon_gentle.name: Gentle Adaptive Dragon
tqc.personality.dragon_gentle.descriptio: Quickly blends into the conversation atmosphere; emotionally driven, with a principle of following through on their word.

dashboard.admin.title: Company Overview
dashboard.admin.net_profit_note: Net Profit is currently a simplified estimate of "Monthly Sales − Commission Expenses" and hasn't yet been wired to a formal general ledger (Chart of Accounts). Once the Finance module posts to the ledger automatically, this will be replaced with real accounting figures. "Monthly Profit" and Net Profit refer to the same number, avoiding a duplicate display of the same amount on the dashboard.
dashboard.leader.title: Team Management (Leader)
dashboard.leader.note: Team summaries only show aggregate numbers, not each member's individual customer list — this is intentional, so an upline can't see the customers a downline is managing.
